---
id: userland-sso-controller-device-authorization
title: "Get device authorization URL"
description: "Initiates the CLI Auth flow by requesting a device code and verification URLs. This endpoint implements the OAuth 2.0 Device Authorization Flow ([RFC 8628](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc8628)) and is designed for command-line applications or other devices with limited input capabilities."
sidebar_label: "Get device authorization URL"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get device authorization URL"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/user_management/authorize/device"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Initiates the CLI Auth flow by requesting a device code and verification URLs. This endpoint implements the OAuth 2.0 Device Authorization Flow ([RFC 8628](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc8628)) and is designed for command-line applications or other devices with limited input capabilities.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
